Plan:
  + host.docker-users1.docker.apt.repository["docker-official"]
    manage docker official apt repository
    source: ../../../examples/docker-users.dbf.hcl:21:host.docker-users1.docker
    + content
      @@ -1,0 +1,6 @@
      + Types: deb
      + URIs: https://download.docker.com/linux/debian
      + Suites: trixie
      + Components: stable
      + Architectures: amd64
      + Signed-By: /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc
    + ensure: "present"
    + group: "root"
    + mode: "0644"
    + name: "docker-official"
    + owner: "root"
    + path: "/etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker_official.sources"
  + host.docker-users1.docker.apt.signing_key["docker-official"]
    manage docker official apt signing key
    source: ../../../examples/docker-users.dbf.hcl:21:host.docker-users1.docker
    + ensure: "present"
    + group: "root"
    + mode: "0644"
    + name: "docker-official"
    + owner: "root"
    + path: "/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc"
    + sha256: "1500c1f56fa9e26b9b8f42452a553675796ade0807cdce11975eb98170b3a570"
    + url: "https://download.docker.com/linux/debian/gpg"
  + host.docker-users1.docker.group["docker"]
    create docker group
    source: ../../../examples/docker-users.dbf.hcl:21:host.docker-users1.docker
    + ensure: "present"
    + gid: ""
    + name: "docker"
    + system: false
  + host.docker-users1.docker.package["containerd.io"]
    install docker package containerd.io
    source: ../../../examples/docker-users.dbf.hcl:21:host.docker-users1.docker
    + ensure: "present"
    + name: "containerd.io"
    + repositories
      + repositories.0: "docker-official"

  + host.docker-users1.docker.package_conflicts
    remove docker conflict packages
    source: ../../../examples/docker-users.dbf.hcl:21:host.docker-users1.docker
    + ensure: "absent"
    + packages
      + packages.0: "docker.io"
      + packages.1: "docker-doc"
      + packages.2: "docker-compose"
      + packages.3: "podman-docker"
      + packages.4: "containerd"
      + packages.5: "runc"
    + remove_conflicts: "auto"
  + host.docker-users1.docker.service["docker"]
    manage docker service
    source: ../../../examples/docker-users.dbf.hcl:21:host.docker-users1.docker
    + enabled: true
    + name: "docker"
    + state: "running"
    + unit: "docker.service"
  + host.docker-users1.docker.user_group_membership["deploy:docker"]
    add user deploy to docker group
    source: ../../../examples/docker-users.dbf.hcl:21:host.docker-users1.docker
    + ensure: "present"
    + group: "docker"
    + note: "user must log out and back in for docker group membership to affect existing sessions"
    + user: "deploy"
  + host.docker-users1.groups.group["deploy"]
    create group deploy
    source: ../../../examples/docker-users.dbf.hcl:8:host.docker-users1.groups.group["deploy"]
    + ensure: "present"
    + gid: ""
    + name: "deploy"
    + system: true
  + host.docker-users1.users.user["deploy"]
    create user deploy
    source: ../../../examples/docker-users.dbf.hcl:14:host.docker-users1.users.user["deploy"]
    + ensure: "present"
    + group: "deploy"
    + groups
    + home: "/home/deploy"
    + name: "deploy"
    + shell: "/bin/bash"
    + ssh_authorized_keys
    + system: false
    + uid: ""
  ! host.docker-users1.apt.cache_refresh
    refresh apt package cache
    triggered_by: host.docker-users1.docker.apt.signing_key["docker-official"], host.docker-users1.docker.apt.repository["docker-official"]
    command: apt-get update

Summary: 13 create, 0 update, 0 delete, 0 no-op, 1 operations
